nasb.text: Great in every respect. First of all, that they were entrusted with the oracles of God.

esv.text: Much in every way. To begin with, the Jews were entrusted with the oracles of God.

cnv.text: 從各方面來說，的確很多。最重要的，是　神的聖言已經託付了他們。

ccb.text: 其实益处非常多！首先，上帝的圣言托付给了犹太人。

csbs.text: 在各方面都有很多。首要的，是神的话语确实委托给他们了。
